title: Instant Pot Dog Food Topper

Vegetables: 1 large sweet potato, peeled and cut into chunks
6-8 large carrots, washed, trimmed, and sliced
2 cups frozen peas or green beans

steps: Microwave the chicken drumsticks for a few minutes to partially cook them.

To ensure the ingredients are evenly distributed, alternate layers of the vegetables and the brown rice in the Instant Pot. For example, place a portion of the sweet potatoes and carrots at the bottom, sprinkle some rice over them, and repeat until all the dry ingredients are added.
Pour the chicken broth and water over the layered vegetables and rice.
Place the precooked drumsticks on top of the layers.
Secure the lid and set the pressure valve to Seal. Cook on high pressure for 35 minutes.
Allow the pressure to release naturally for 30-45 minutes before opening the lid.
Remove the drumsticks, discard the bones, and stir the meat back into the pot. The earlier layering ensures the rice is well-interspersed throughout the mixture.
For a bit of variety, you can occasionally swap the chicken for ground turkey or add a small amount of plain canned pumpkin to the mix.
